title: Enki Hosted Release Candidate and Deployment Decision
description: Consolidate hosted validation, architecture, multi-consumer operation, zero-cost envelope, production-control readiness, portability, recovery, limitations, and exact evidence into a final hosted Enki release candidate and explicit human deployment decision package.
acceptance_criteria: The release candidate binds exact architecture, hosted TEST, multi-consumer, recovery, portability, performance, and security evidence
Software readiness, hosted validation, zero-cost envelope, and production deployment readiness remain separate conclusions
Known limitations, unresolved controls, runbooks, rollback, migration, support boundaries, and independent-review requirements are explicit
Failed or missing evidence cannot be represented as passing
Only an explicit human decision can authorize deployment
